title: Baramulla
tmdbOverview: A cop's inquiry into child kidnappings unravels chilling secrets as supernatural events endanger his family and the peaceful town of Baramulla.
synopsis: Baramulla is a 2025 horror film from India. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
